Top themes this week:

App Crashes on Portfolio Screen negative
Users report the app crashes frequently when opening the portfolio or placing orders, leading to frustration and lost trust.
KYC Process Is Slow and Confusing negative
Multiple users complain about the lengthy and opaque KYC verification process, causing delays in account activation.
Clean UI Makes Investing Simple positive
Users praise the clean, intuitive interface that makes investing accessible for beginners.

Suggested actions:
• Fix Portfolio Screen Crash
• Streamline KYC Flow
